headline: The war in Iran, far from weakening the Islamic Republic, has consolidated its power
description: While Donald Trump expected the Iranian regime to fall, the war he has waged with Israel appears to have strengthened the regime's core, reinforcing military and security structures and accelerating domestic repression.

headline: Iran launches missiles at Israel for first time since Middle East truce
Farida Rustamova: 'Putin is at an impasse, unable to win or abandon this war'
French industry turns to war for jobs
description: As layoffs and plant closures spread across the automotive sector, defense, which was once criticized on moral grounds, is now seen as a new promised land for both manufacturers and workers.

headline: Working-class landmarks in the Paris region are being taken over by luxury and art powers
description: Projects such as Le Large, built on a historic Renault factory site on Seguin island, or at the Maison du Peuple in Paris's northwestern suburbs, illustrate how major corporations are taking over former industrial sites.

headline: Alexander Zverez is no longer a king without a crown
description: After losing three Grand Slam finals, the German defeated Italy's Flavio Cobolli in the French Open on Sunday.

headline: How China, the world's factory, transformed itself into an industrial superpower
description: 'How China is Devouring Europe' (3/4). Kunshan specializes in electronics, Heshan in children's books… Along the Yangtze and the Pearl River, the multitude of industrial cities bear witness to how the country has transformed itself into a manufacturing juggernaut.

France revives Gratitude Train for the US's 250th anniversary
description: A restored railcar from northern France will retrace the journey of the Gratitude Train, which carried gifts from Le Havre to New York in 1949.

headline: Bernadette Chirac, the wife of ex-president Jacques Chirac, has died
description: An unfailing supporter of her husband's career, Bernadette Chodron de Courcel became a key figure a French politics. She was elected local councilor, a rare feat for a 'wife of,' and was very involved in charity work. She died at the age of 93.

headline: Zelensky's letter to Putin is actually addressed to Russia's elites who are tired of the war in Ukraine
description: Behind the offer of an outstretched hand, the Ukrainian president's letter to the Russian leader seeks to exploit Moscow's vulnerabilities and the Russian people's exhaustion after four years of high-intensity war.
